title: Kujitambulisha
description: Learn how to introduce yourself, talk about your job, and describe what you do. This is the gateway to professional English.
description_sw: Jifunze jinsi ya kujitambulisha, kuzungumza kuhusu kazi yako, na kuelezea kile unachokifanya. Hii ni mlango wa lugha ya kazi.
sofia_intro: Introducing yourself is the first step to success. Today you learn how to say your name, your job, and what you do. This is crucial for your career!
sofia_intro_sw: Kujitambulisha ndio mlango wa kwanza wa mafanikio. Leo utajifunza jinsi ya kusema jina lako, kazi yako, na kile unachokifanya. Hii ni muhimu kwa ajili ya kazi yako!

lessons.title: Key Vocabulary for Introduction
lessons.sofia_hint: Click each word to hear it. These words are essential for introducing yourself!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Bonyeza kila neno kulisikia. Maneno haya ni muhimu kwa kujitambulisha!

words.example: My job is as a developer.
I work for a big company.
I have a passion for technology.

lessons.title: Introduction Dialogues
lessons.sofia_hint: Listen to these real introduction conversations. Then read along and practice!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Sikiliza mazungumzo halisi ya kujitambulisha. Kisha soma pamoja na fanya mazoezi!

lines.speaker: Person B
lines.en: Nice to meet you, Juma. I am Sarah.
lines.sw: Furaha kukutana nawe, Juma. Mimi ni Sarah.

lines.speaker: Person A
lines.en: Nice to meet you too. What do you do?
lines.sw: Furaha kukutana nawe pia. Unafanya kazi gani?

lines.speaker: Person B
lines.en: I am a teacher. What about you?

lines.speaker: Person A
lines.en: I work in technology. I am a developer.
lines.sw: Ninafanya kazi katika teknolojia. Mimi ni msanidi wa programu.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Good morning. My name is James. I am a software developer.
lines.sw: Habari za asubuhi. Jina langu ni James. Mimi ni msanidi wa programu ya kompyuta.

lines.speaker: Recruiter
lines.en: Pleased to meet you, James. Tell me about your experience.
lines.sw: Furaha kukutana nawe, James. Nipe maelezo kuhusu uzoefu wako.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I have five years of experience building websites. I help companies succeed online.
lines.sw: Nina miaka mitano ya uzoefu katika kujenga wavuti. Ninasaidia kampuni kuwa na mafanikio online.

lines.speaker: Recruiter
lines.en: That is impressive. What is your passion?
lines.sw: Hilo ni jambo la kuvutia. Ni nini shauku yako?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: My passion is creating solutions that solve real problems for people.
lines.sw: Shauku yangu ni kuunda suluhisho linalotatua matatizo halisi kwa watu.

lessons.title: Introduction and Work Quiz
lessons.sofia_hint: Choose the correct answer for each question about introducing yourself.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Chagua jibu sahihi kwa kila swali kuhusu kujitambulisha.

questions.prompt: How do you introduce your name? (Unajitambulisha kwa jinsi gani?)
questions.prompt_sw: How do you introduce your name? (Unajitambulisha kwa jinsi gani?)

questions.prompt: 'I am a developer' means: (Kauli 'I am a developer' inamaanisha:)
questions.prompt_sw: 'I am a developer' means: (Kauli 'I am a developer' inamaanisha:)

questions.prompt: What is a good response to 'What do you do?' (Jibu bora la 'What do you do?' ni lipi?)
questions.prompt_sw: What is a good response to 'What do you do?' (Jibu bora la 'What do you do?' ni lipi?)

questions.prompt: Which sentence is correct? (Sentensi ipi ni sahihi?)
questions.prompt_sw: Which sentence is correct? (Sentensi ipi ni sahihi?)
options_sw: Kampuni zinasaidia mimi kuwa na mafanikio

questions.prompt: What is a good 'passion' to mention? (Ni 'shauku' gani nzuri kumtaja?)
questions.prompt_sw: What is a good 'passion' to mention? (Ni 'shauku' gani nzuri kumtaja?)

questions.prompt: 'I have 5 years of experience' shows: (Kauli 'I have 5 years of experience' inaonyesha:)
questions.prompt_sw: 'I have 5 years of experience' shows: (Kauli 'I have 5 years of experience' inaonyesha:)

questions.prompt: When introducing yourself professionally, what should you mention? (Unapojitambulisha kwa mtaalamu, nini unapaswa kumtaja?)
questions.prompt_sw: When introducing yourself professionally, what should you mention? (Unapojitambulisha kwa mtaalamu, nini unapaswa kumtaja?)
options_sw: Jina lako, kazi, na uzoefu wako

questions.prompt: Complete the introduction: 'My name is ________.' (Kamilisha kujitambulisha: 'My name is ________.')
questions.prompt_sw: Complete the introduction: 'My name is ________.' (Kamilisha kujitambulisha: 'My name is ________.')

questions.prompt: 'I work as a teacher' means: ('Ninafanya kazi kama mwalimu' inamaanisha:)
questions.prompt_sw: 'I work as a teacher' means: ('Ninafanya kazi kama mwalimu' inamaanisha:)
options: I study to be a teacher

questions.prompt: What helps you stand out in an introduction? (Nini kinakusaidia kuonekana tofauti katika kujitambulisha?)
questions.prompt_sw: What helps you stand out in an introduction? (Nini kinakusaidia kuonekana tofauti katika kujitambulisha?)

questions.prompt: The best introduction is: (Kujitambulisha bora zaidi ni:)
questions.prompt_sw: The best introduction is: (Kujitambulisha bora zaidi ni:)
options_sw: Wazi, yenye ujasiri, na ya kukamatia

questions.prompt: Which introduces job first? (Lipi linajitambulisha kazi kwanza?)
questions.prompt_sw: Which introduces job first? (Lipi linajitambulisha kazi kwanza?)
options: My name is James, and I am a developer
I like my job very much
options_sw: Habari, mimi ni msanidi wa programu
Jina langu ni James, na mimi ni msanidi wa programu
Ninafanya kazi kwa bidii kila siku
